name: Hero Rescue: Gold Glory
description: Pull the right pins and become a legend in Hero Rescue! Guide your hero through deadly traps, locked bars, and clever puzzles to collect gold, save the princess, and escape each level. One wrong move can mean disaster-lava, monsters, or lost treasure. Think ahead, plan your pulls, and prove your logic in epic rescue quests. Simple controls, challenging levels, and rewarding victories await. Are you smart enough to rescue the hero?
instructions: Look at the level and find the pins Pull the pins in the correct order Guide the hero to collect the coins Remove bars and obstacles blocking the hero Help the hero reach the princess safely Avoid dangers like lava traps and enemies
